notes: Primary case. zachxbt called it out DURING the 11,000% pump. 3 team wallets held ~90%, 18.58M RAVE moved to Bitget hours before surge. Token crashed ~85% on Apr 18 (4 days after tweet). Listed on Binance, Bitget, Gate.
Post-mortem. Main -97% crash was July 14, 2025 (9-10am) — BEFORE the July 22 tweet. Tests whether post-mortem exposés still have edge. Listed on Binance perps.

Feb 24 2026 'major investigation' teaser. zachxbt didn't name any project, but HYPE dropped 4.4% on speculation. Final exposé (Axiom on Feb 26) hit none of these tokens. Tests whether zachxbt teasers themselves are tradeable.
Feb 24 2026 teaser. MET dropped 6.5% on speculation. Polymarket had Meteora as top guess (47%) for who zachxbt would expose. Actual exposé was Axiom — MET was false positive.
Feb 24 2026 teaser. PUMP dropped 6.6% on speculation that Pump.fun would be the target. Actual exposé was Axiom — PUMP was false positive.

Haliey Welch memecoin launched Dec 4 2024. Went from $500M market cap to $60M in 20 minutes. zachxbt critiqued her same day. Post-crash exposé — minimal predictive edge expected. Need Solana contract address for DEX leg.

Argentine president Milei promoted LIBRA on Feb 14 2025. Pumped 3,000% then dumped 95% in hours ($4.4B erased). zachxbt covered the unfolding rug. Same-day pump-and-dump. Need Solana contract for DEX lookup.
Solana pump.fun memecoin, zachxbt tweeted Jan 23 2026 linking the deployer to $46M in alleged stolen US Marshals funds. Need Solana contract for DEX lookup.
Solana PumpSwap memecoin. Pump-and-dump by coordinated X accounts on Feb 22, 2026; zachxbt's March 23 tweet was post-rug. Already dead by tweet time.
Blast-based GameFi exploit, ~$62M drained, insider dev. No Munchables token — project had no liquid token. Backtest will skip.
